subcodes.first_line: O Lord, O Thou Kind One! Thy friends are wanderers in Thy path and enchanted by Thy countenance; they yearn for Thy presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: پروردگارا مهربانا یاران سرگشته کوی تواند و دلبسته روی تو مشتاق دیدارند و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
